title: Night Vision Toggle
description: Allows you to toggle night vision using a key binding (N by default) and invisibility (I by default)
body:
> **Night vision toggle _(N)_ + Invisibility toggle _(I)_.
And you can use commands to toggle:**
 - /night_vision_toggle **or**  /n
 - /invisibility_toggle **or**  /i
> The mod is available in **Russian** and **English**. When you press **F3+N** _(spectator)_, night vision will **not toggle**.

- **Addon to mod: [Fast commands](https://modrinth.com/mod/fast-commands)**
